homepage.title: Enes Başpınar
homepage.description: I have always enjoyed doing research and learning new things. I also love sharing what I learn, and I write articles based on notes I take from various resources. My motivation is to rescue people from monotonous and boring blogs. After reading most articles, I feel like screaming and I shout out my frustration here just like the gif. Let's meet in my articles!

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: I wrote my first article in May 2020. Since then, I have written many articles but I have deleted most of them because they didn't meet my standards. I try to keep my writings away from formality. I'm trying to answer any possible questions you might have. You can give me your feedback on Twitter. I hope you learn and have fun.
